'''''UFC 312: du Plessis vs. Strickland 2''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on February 9, 2025,<!-- Local date as per Wikipedia guidelines. This is the date in Australia where the event is held --> at the [[Sydney SuperDome|Qudos Bank Arena]] in [[Sydney]], Australia.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2024/10/ufc-312-date-location-sydney-fight-card-news|title=UFC 312 officially announced for Syndey|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2024-10-16|access-date=2024-10-16}}</ref><ref name="Sydney">{{Cite web|url=https://www.nsw.gov.au/media-releases/return-of-ufc-octagon-puts-sydney-cage-on-world-stage|title=Return of UFC Octagon puts Sydney cage on the world stage|publisher=nsw.gov.au|author=NSW Government|date=2024-10-17|access-date=2024-10-17}}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's seventh visit to Sydney and first since [[UFC 293]] in September 2023.<ref name="Sydney" />

A [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] rematch between current champion [[Dricus du Plessis]] (also former [[Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki#Welterweight championship|KSW Welterweight Champion]]) and former champion [[Sean Strickland]] headlined the event.<ref name="titlefights">{{Cite web|url=https://www.si.com/fannation/mma/news/ufc-announces-2-huge-title-fights-for-ufc-312|title=UFC announces 2 huge title fights for UFC 312|publisher=si.com|author=Mathew Riddle|date=2024-12-07|access-date=2024-12-07}}</ref> The pairing previously met one year prior at [[UFC 297]] in which du Plessis captured the title by split decision.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/1/21/24045654/dricus-du-plessis-dethrones-sean-strickland-win-title-ufc-297-main-event-calls-out-israel-adesanya|title=Dricus du Plessis dethrones Sean Strickland to win title in UFC 297 main event, calls out Israel Adesanya|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Damon Martin|date=2024-01-21|access-date=2024-12-07}}</ref>

A [[UFC Women's Strawweight Championship]] bout between current two-time champion [[Zhang Weili]] and [[The Ultimate Fighter: Team Joanna vs. Team Cláudia]] strawweight winner [[Tatiana Suarez]] served as the co-main event.<ref name="titlefights"/>

A light heavyweight bout between [[Jimmy Crute]] and [[Marcin Prachnio]] was scheduled for this event.<ref name=":1">{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2024/11/ufc-312-first-three-bouts-announced|title=First three bouts announced for UFC 312 in Australia|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Danny Segura|date=2024-11-11|access-date=2025-01-07}}</ref> However, Prachnio withdrew from the fight for unknown reasons and was replaced by former [[Legacy_Fighting_Alliance#LFA_Light_Heavyweight_Championship|LFA Light Heavyweight Champion]] Rodolfo Bellato.<ref name="Bellato">{{Cite web|title=Unofficially: Marcin Prachnio will not appear at UFC 312, Jimmy Crute with a new rival|url=https://www.lowking.pl/nieoficjalnie-marcin-prachnio-nie-wystapi-na-ufc-312-jimmy-crute-z-nowym-rywalem/|date=2025-01-06|access-date=2025-01-07|publisher=lowking.pl|author=Bartłomiej Stachura}} {{in lang|pl}}</ref>

[[Road to UFC Season 2]] flyweight winner Rei Tsuruya and Stewart Nicoll were scheduled to meet in a flyweight bout.<ref name=":1"/> However, Nicoll was forced to withdraw due to an injury and the bout was cancelled.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.forbes.com/sites/brianmazique/2025/01/15/ufc-312--fight-canceled-heres-the-updated-card-for-sydney/|title=UFC 312 Fight Canceled, Here's The Updated Card For Sydney|work=forbes.com|author=Brian Mazique|date=2025-01-15|access-date=2025-01-15}}</ref>

A bantamweight bout between promotional newcomer [[Aleksandre Topuria]] and Cody Haddon was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Aleksandre Topuria already has a date and rival for his UFC debut|url=https://www.abc.es/deportes/mma/aleksandre-topuria-fecha-rival-debut-ufc-20241220214707-nt.html|date=2024-12-20|access-date=2024-12-21|publisher=abc.es|author=Álvaro Colmenero}} {{in lang|es}}</ref> However, Haddon withdrew from the fight due to a foot injury and was replaced by fellow newcomer Colby Thicknesse.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2025/01/ufc-312-volkanovski-ilia-aleksandre-topuria-vs-colby-thickenesse|title=Broken foot results in Topuria vs. Volkanovski team battle at UFC 312|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-01-29|access-date=2025-01-29}}</ref>

A flyweight bout between [[Road to UFC Season 1]] flyweight winner [[Park Hyun-sung]] and Nyamjargal Tumendemberel was scheduled for the event.<ref name="Nyam vs. Park">{{Cite web|url=https://www.forbes.com/sites/brianmazique/2025/01/15/ufc-312--fight-canceled-heres-the-updated-card-for-sydney/|title=UFC 312 fight canceled, here's the updated card for Sydney|work=forbes.com|author=Brian Mazique|date=2025-01-15|access-date=2025-01-15}}</ref> However, the bout was canceled due to a weight management issue with Nyamjargal.<ref>{{Cite web|author=Jay Anderson|date=2025-02-07|title=Park Hyun-sung vs. Nyamjargal Tumendemberel scratched from UFC 312 ahead of weigh-ins|url=https://cagesidepress.com/2025/02/06/park-hyun-sung-vs-nyamjargal-tumendemberel-scratched-from-ufc-312-ahead-of-weigh-ins/|access-date=2025-02-07|publisher=cagesidepress.com}}</ref>

During the event's broadcast, it was announced that the interim [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] bout that took place in April 2019 at [[UFC 236]] between [[Israel Adesanya]] (who would go on to become a two-time middleweight champion) and [[The Ultimate Fighter: Team Jones vs. Team Sonnen]] middleweight winner [[Kelvin Gastelum]] would be the next "fight wing" [[UFC Hall of Fame]] inductee during International Fight Week festivities in Las Vegas this summer. Adesanya won the interim title via unanimous decision after a back-and-forth contest.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2025/02/israel-adesanya-vs-kelvin-gastelum-ufc-hall-of-fame|title=Israel Adesanya vs. Kelvin Gastelum interim title-fight war joins UFC Hall of Fame Class of 2025|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Simon Samano|date=2025-02-08|access-date=2025-02-08}}</ref>

== Bonus awards ==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/ufc-312/ufc-312-bonus-report-quillan-salkilld-one-of-four-fighters-to-take-home-50k/|title=UFC 312 Bonus Report: Quillan Salkilld one of four fighters to take home $50k|publisher=bjpenn.com|author=Chris Taylor|date=2025-02-09|access-date=2025-02-09}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Rong Zhu vs. Kody Steele'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Tallison Teixeira''' and '''Quillan Salkilld'''
